props.text: Same day, two opposite calibration lessons: Tamil Nadu broke Polymarket (DMK 87.5% on counting eve → near-0 as TVK swept; $22.66M market) while Bengal validated the PM 51% flip-to-BJP at 99.55% YES. Continuity-prior fail + independent-evidence flip in one news cycle.

props.title: TVK crosses 118 majority in Tamil Nadu while BJP leads 150+ in Bengal — single most data-dense same-day primary-press post; both calibration-lesson states in one frame.

YSR Congress MP frames TVK debut as "South India creates space for credible non-partisan regional voices; legacy parties carry baggage" — single elected-official post-mortem on why the continuity prior failed.
Supporters at Vijay's Chennai residence "as the party scripts history" — first primary-press confirmation of historic-result framing rather than seat-tally framing.
Heightened security at Vijay's Chennai residence with TVK leading 107 of 234 — earliest in-day ground-reaction marker, before majority threshold crossed.
TVK chief Vijay arrives at his parents' residence in Chennai — first physical-appearance-as-winner shot. Highest-shock visual primary source of the day for the upset narrative.
